rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing EOF to annex blocks
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;` syntax
Use `assign output = expression;` syntax for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE errors; instead, remove invalid clauses or fix root references
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
